events.label: reasoning
events.text: We are asked to assess a field condition: "missing surge protection on field side" for loop checks & wiring. The work is through testing/inspection. Reference: loop drawings, ISA 5.1. The condition is missing surge protection. This is a defect: surge protection is required per standards and drawings. So decision: fail. Risk: likely high or critical because missing surge protection can lead to equipment damage, safety hazards. Work stage: tested/inspected. Component conditions: installed-defective (missing surge protection is a defect). Percent complete: maybe 90%? But missing a component, so not fully complete. Value: not applicable. Sound source: not applicable. Confidence: high. Event time, rate, order, workable: not needed. Findings: "Missing surge protection on field side as per loop drawings and ISA 5.1." Actions: "Install surge protection device immediately." Rationale: "Surge protection is required to protect instrumentation from voltage spikes; its absence is a non-compliance and safety risk." References: "ISA 5.1, loop drawings". So JSON.
